name: HVI Solar Irrigation Valve
desc: Solar-powered irrigation valve requiring no grid power — ideal for remote agricultural applications.
overview: The HVI solar-powered irrigation valve operates entirely off-grid with a 14V monocrystalline solar panel and integrated backup battery (7–15 days autonomy). LoRaWAN / 4G communication covers up to 10km. Bluetooth app for on-site commissioning. IP67 waterproof. Compatible with soil moisture sensors.

specs.label: Battery
specs.value: Built-in rechargeable lithium battery (7–15 day backup)

features: Independent solar power: 10–20W monocrystalline panel (efficiency ≥22%) with 7–15 day battery backup
Ultra-low power design: static current ≤50µA, auto-switches between solar charging and battery
Supports 4G/LoRaWAN wireless communication with coverage up to 3–10 km
Flexible control: adjust valve opening 0–100% via smartphone app or web browser
Integrates soil moisture and rainfall sensors for demand-based smart irrigation
Real-time monitoring: reports valve status, battery level, and environmental parameters
Automatic fault detection: self-detects valve jamming, communication failure, low battery
Comprehensive protection: over-flow, over-pressure, low-battery, short-circuit, reverse-polarity protection
